SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAY CLEANING SOLUTIONS, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TROY GREEK CUISINE $1,515.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,595.00, PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT AGAINST FIRAS MASARWEH IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
